message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This page from a Trane HVAC manual describes control system components, including external setpoints, module features, and communication interfaces. It provides technical specifications for various modules like 1A1 (power), 1A4/1A6 (digital inputs), 1A5/1A8/1A9 (relay outputs), and 1A14 (communication interface), along with pinout tables for communication ports.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "控制系统组件 (Control System Components)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "外部冷冻水设定 External Chilled Water Setpoint (ECWS)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "外部电流限制设定值 External Current Limit Setpoint"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "模块特征 (Module Features)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "1A1, 电源 (Power)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "1A4,1A6,双路高压数字信号输入模块 (Dual High-Voltage Digital Input Modules)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "1A5, 1A8, 1A9四位继电器输出状态 (Four-Channel Relay Output Status)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "1A13, 1A18, 1A19, 1A20 双两元输入模块 (Dual Binary Input Modules)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "1A14 通信界面模块 (Communication Interface Module)"},
    {"type": "table", "label": "1A14通讯口极性 (1A14 Communication Port Pinout)"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "TRANE logo"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["technical_specifications", "module_descriptions", "pinout_diagrams", "control_system_overview"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "控制系统组件
外部冷冻水设定 External Chilled Water Setpoint(ECWS)
外部冷冻水设定可对冷冻水的设定在远程进行修改。
外部冷冻水设定建立在1A16 J2-2至J2-6(接地)的输入基础上。2-10 vdc和4-20 mA对应于34至65°F (-36.7 to 18.3 °C)的CWS范围。缺省的34°F至65°F可通过维护工具调节。
外部电流限制设定值 External Current Limit Setpoint
外部电流限制选项运行远程调整电流限制设定值。外部电流限制设定值位于1A16 J2-5到J2-6(接地), 2-10V直流电压和4-20 mA电流对应于40-120%RLA。CH530限制最大ECLS为100%。
模块特征
1A1,电源:
机组控制电源模块将27V交流电转换为24V直流电。
电源输入电压: 最低23VRMS, 额定27VRMS, 最高30VRMS
频率: 50-60Hz
电流: 满负荷27V交流-4.30A (RMS), 启动电流27V交流-30A (RMS)
电源输出: 第二级电压24V直流, 额定电流2.44安培。
1A4,1A6,双路高压数字信号输入模块:
数字输入信号#1 J2-1至2
数字输入信号#2 J3-1至2
高压数字信号输入: 关时电压: 0-40V交流RMS, 开时电压: 70-276V交流RMS
输入无极性敏感(可以切换Hot和neutral)。输入电阻130K-280K欧姆。
14-26AWG, 带两个14AWG的最大值。
电源: 24V直流+/-10%VDC, 最大20mA。特灵IPC3协议。J1-1 +24V直流, J1-2 接地, J1-3 COMM +, J1-4 COMM -。
1A5, 1A8, 1A9四位继电器输出状态:
继电器#1 J2-1 NO, J2-2 NC,
J2-3 COMM
继电器#2 J2-4 NO, J2-5 NC, J2-6 COMM
继电器#3 J2-7 NO, J2-8 NC, J2-9 COMM
继电器#4 J2-10 NO, J2-11 NC, J2-12 COMM
继电器输出: 120 VAC时的继电器输出: 吸合时7.2 A, 断开时2.88 A, 1/3 HP, 240 VAC时7.2 FLA: 5 A, 普通用途, 14 - 26 AWG 带两个14 AWG, 24 +/-10 percent VDC, 最大100 mA. Trane IPC3协议.
1A13, 1A18, 1A19, 1A20 双两元输入模块:
J2-1 两元输入信号#1, J2-2 接地, J2-3 两元输入信号#2, J2-4 接地
两元输入: 寻找一个干式接触关闭。低电压24V 12 mA.
14 - 26 AWG带两个14 AWG 电源, 24 +/- 10 %VDC, 最大40 mA Trane IPC3协议.
1A14 通信界面模块
1A14通讯口极性
J1-1 +24 VDC J2-1 COMM +. J11-1+24 VDC
J1-2 Ground J2-2 COMM - J11-2 Ground
J1-3 COMM + J2-3 COMM + J11-3 COMM +
J1-4 COMM - J2-4 COMM - J11-4 COMM-",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page contains dense technical text in Chinese with some English terms. Relationships between modules (e.g., how they connect to each other) are not visually depicted; only individual module specifications and a pinout table are shown. The pinout table is for module 1A14 only.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page from a Trane HVAC manual describes control system components, including external setpoints, module features, and communication interfaces. It provides technical specifications for various modules like 1A1 (power), 1A4/1A6 (digital inputs), 1A5/1A8/1A9 (relay outputs), and 1A14 (communication interface), along with pinout tables for communication ports.

visual_entities.label: 控制系统组件 (Control System Components)
外部冷冻水设定 External Chilled Water Setpoint (ECWS)
外部电流限制设定值 External Current Limit Setpoint
1A4,1A6,双路高压数字信号输入模块 (Dual High-Voltage Digital Input Modules)
1A5, 1A8, 1A9四位继电器输出状态 (Four-Channel Relay Output Status)
1A13, 1A18, 1A19, 1A20 双两元输入模块 (Dual Binary Input Modules)
1A14 通信界面模块 (Communication Interface Module)

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
控制系统组件
外部冷冻水设定 External Chilled Water Setpoint(ECWS)
外部冷冻水设定可对冷冻水的设定在远程进行修改。
外部冷冻水设定建立在1A16 J2-2至J2-6(接地)的输入基础上。2-10 vdc和4-20 mA对应于34至65°F (-36.7 to 18.3 °C)的CWS范围。缺省的34°F至65°F可通过维护工具调节。
外部电流限制设定值 External Current Limit Setpoint
外部电流限制选项运行远程调整电流限制设定值。外部电流限制设定值位于1A16 J2-5到J2-6(接地), 2-10V直流电压和4-20 mA电流对应于40-120%RLA。CH530限制最大ECLS为100%。
模块特征
1A1,电源:
机组控制电源模块将27V交流电转换为24V直流电。
电源输入电压: 最低23VRMS, 额定27VRMS, 最高30VRMS
频率: 50-60Hz
电流: 满负荷27V交流-4.30A (RMS), 启动电流27V交流-30A (RMS)
电源输出: 第二级电压24V直流, 额定电流2.44安培。
1A4,1A6,双路高压数字信号输入模块:
数字输入信号#1 J2-1至2
数字输入信号#2 J3-1至2
高压数字信号输入: 关时电压: 0-40V交流RMS, 开时电压: 70-276V交流RMS
输入无极性敏感(可以切换Hot和neutral)。输入电阻130K-280K欧姆。
14-26AWG, 带两个14AWG的最大值。
电源: 24V直流+/-10%VDC, 最大20mA。特灵IPC3协议。J1-1 +24V直流, J1-2 接地, J1-3 COMM +, J1-4 COMM -。
1A5, 1A8, 1A9四位继电器输出状态:
继电器#1 J2-1 NO, J2-2 NC,
J2-3 COMM
继电器#2 J2-4 NO, J2-5 NC, J2-6 COMM
继电器#3 J2-7 NO, J2-8 NC, J2-9 COMM
继电器#4 J2-10 NO, J2-11 NC, J2-12 COMM
继电器输出: 120 VAC时的继电器输出: 吸合时7.2 A, 断开时2.88 A, 1/3 HP, 240 VAC时7.2 FLA: 5 A, 普通用途, 14 - 26 AWG 带两个14 AWG, 24 +/-10 percent VDC, 最大100 mA. Trane IPC3协议.
1A13, 1A18, 1A19, 1A20 双两元输入模块:
J2-1 两元输入信号#1, J2-2 接地, J2-3 两元输入信号#2, J2-4 接地
两元输入: 寻找一个干式接触关闭。低电压24V 12 mA.
14 - 26 AWG带两个14 AWG 电源, 24 +/- 10 %VDC, 最大40 mA Trane IPC3协议.
1A14 通信界面模块
1A14通讯口极性
J1-1 +24 VDC J2-1 COMM +. J11-1+24 VDC
J1-2 Ground J2-2 COMM - J11-2 Ground
J1-3 COMM + J2-3 COMM + J11-3 COMM +
J1-4 COMM - J2-4 COMM - J11-4 COMM-
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page contains dense technical text in Chinese with some English terms. Relationships between modules (e.g., how they connect to each other) are not visually depicted; only individual module specifications and a pinout table are shown. The pinout table is for module 1A14 only.
